content:
# Environmental Geoscience

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009]] contributed to the theme of Environmental Geoscience

- [[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014]] applied environmental geology to assess soil quality in Dammam.

- [[2014-wajheeuddin|Wajheeuddin, 2014]] addressed the environmental impact of toxic drilling fluids on marine life and soil health.

- [[2015-musa|Musa, 2015]] addressed environmental issues by developing materials for heavy metal removal from water.

- [[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015]] addressed environmental issues related to waste tire disposal and sulfur emissions.

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] addressed environmental challenges through green chemistry.

- [[2015-bello|Bello, 2015]] applied environmental-geoscience to evaluate phytoremediation potential.

- [[2015-akere|Akere, 2015]] applied environmental geosciences to assess organotin pollution.

- [[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015]] applied environmental-geoscience to assess coastal impacts of sewage.

- [[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015]] used environmental-geoscience to assess the impact of pollution and seasonality on foraminifera.

- [[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015]] applied to assess the impact of industrial waste on a wetland ecosystem.

- [[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016]] applied environmental geoscience to analyze how local climate affects biological vectors.

- [[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016]] applied environmental-geoscience to assess air quality in industrial zones.

- [[2016-sameh|Sameh, 2016]] addressed the impact of drilling fluids on groundwater quality.

- [[2017-amao|Amao, 2017]] used foraminifera as indicators for environmental stress and pollution.

- [[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019]] applied environmental-geoscience to evaluate particulate matter across the Arabian Peninsula.

- [[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019]] analyzed environmental impacts on mangrove ecosystems.

- [[2019-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2019]] applied environmental-geoscience to study nitrate contamination.

- [[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]] applied environmental geoscience to model air quality impacts from industrial emissions.

- [[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022]] applied environmental geoscience to assess waste management impacts.

- [[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023]] applied environmental-geoscience to assess marine habitat quality in a high-stress zone.

- [[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023]] applied environmental-geology to assess the impact of salinity on foraminifera.

- [[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025]] addressed groundwater remediation as an environmental geoscience problem.

- [[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025]] applied environmental geoscience to evaluate carbon mineralization in local basalt.

- [[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000]] addressed environmental-geoscience through building safety analysis.

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Environmental Geoscience ([[2009-zubair|Zubair, 2009]])

- Identified hot spots of heavy metal contamination in urban areas. ([[2014-adedapo|Adedapo, 2014, p. 12]])

- The use of date seeds, grass, and grass ash is suitable for the formulation of a low-cost, environment-friendly and sustainable drilling fluid system. ([[2014-wajheeuddin|Wajheeuddin, 2014, p. 18]])

- The resin showed high resistance to competing species in real industrial wastewater samples. ([[2015-musa|Musa, 2015, p. 100]])

- The amount of refractory sulfur compounds adsorbed followed the order DBT > BT > T. ([[2015-danmaliki|Danmaliki, 2015, p. 19]])

- Not stated in source ([[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]])

- Investigated heavy metal and PAH removal from contaminated water. ([[2015-bello|Bello, 2015, p. 110]])

- No significant influence was found between water quality parameters (pH, salinity) and organotins. ([[2015-akere|Akere, 2015, p. 54]])

- All three outfall locations were found to serve as important sources of inorganic nutrient into the coastal waters. ([[2015-yusuf|Yusuf, 2015, p. 14]])

- Foraminifera serve as bio-indicators for coastal health in the Arabian Gulf. ([[2015-arslan|Arslan, 2015, p. 17]])

- GIS is a powerful tool for successful environmental management, including monitoring and risk assessment. ([[2015-jawad|Jawad, 2015, p. 37]])

- Climate factors (temperature, humidity, rainfall) were primary drivers for mosquito distribution. ([[2016-yasin|Yasin, 2016, p. 95]])

- Most PM was determined to be of crustal origin, indicating a natural/biogenic source. ([[2016-lawal-2|Lawal, 2016, p. 15]])

- Groundwater in oil/gas areas is highly susceptible to contamination by BTEX compounds. ([[2016-sameh|Sameh, 2016, p. 18]])

- Foraminiferal response to heavy metal pollution, nutrient input, and natural stress is well documented. ([[2017-amao|Amao, 2017, p. 85]])

- Analysis showed that man-made particulates increased in Western (72%) and Southern (18%) regions. ([[2019-alotaibi|Alotaibi, 2019, p. 187]])

- Mangroves act as natural filters for anthropogenic contaminants. ([[2019-alamran|AlAmran, 2019, p. 15]])

- Nitrate concentrations are linked to agricultural practices and waste management. ([[2019-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2019, p. 52]])

- Not stated in source ([[2022-mustapha|Mustapha, 2022]])

- Remote sensing and soil chemistry were used to evaluate the impact of illegal dumping on local environments. ([[2022-al-harbi|Al-Harbi, 2022, p. 13]])

- The Uqair area serves as an ideal reference for coastal conditions despite its natural salinity stress. ([[2023-nasir|Nasir, 2023, p. 41]])

- Determined that natural stressors (salinity) were more likely than human factors to cause deformities. ([[2023-prayudi|Prayudi, 2023, p. 76]])

- Colloidal Activated Carbon (CAC) showed promise for in-situ treatment of contaminated aquifers. ([[2025-almousa|Almousa, 2025, p. 19]])

- Surface mineralization is a viable technology for Saudi Arabia's net-zero goals. ([[2025-alghawi|Alghawi, 2025, p. 14]])

- Identified a need for systematic compliance checklists to improve residential safety. ([[2000-hashmi|Hashmi, 2000, p. 254]])
